title: Akane's PvP Pack
description: My personal PvP pack to any vanilla+simple voice chat server.
body:
PvP pack for SMP's and other survivals servers featuring potions resourcepacks, dark ui, customizable keybinds and some optmizations and shaders.

has 1 mod to unbind all of your binds for you to set just the binds you want to dont have a lot of keybinds on keys you will never use.
